name: Ongezellig the RPG
description:
"Ongeze- what?" yeah that indie dutch animation that got quite famous some years ago

"will it interfer on the holidays special bots?" no, dont worry, there will be some christmas and new years bot

i wasnt going to do it, but i was too tired to wait for dokawaki make his own so yea...i made one myself :P

you can have four scenarios, one that youre one of their adopted siblings (1st and 2nd scenario), a classmate (3rd scenario) and of course, a make your own scenario (4th scenario)
creator: HenriqueMFC
